metadata.description: The bottega workshop — autonomous long-running agent runs with signed acceptance, distributed as a single installable plugin.

plugins.name: bottega
plugins.description: One entry point, /bottega:run: the maestro discovers the intent, decides the execution path, builds with a cross-family-reviewed fleet, and delivers an evidenced PR. Signed Gherkin contracts only when the work earns them; handed an issue unattended, it auto-signs and the PR is the only human touchpoint.
